title: NEET Cut Off 2026 Expected Marks Category Wise

detail.title: NEET Cut Off 2026 Expected Marks Category Wise
detail.short_info: NEET Cut Off 2026 for MBBS Government College is expected to be 610–680 for the General category. Check category-wise expected marks, state quota vs AIQ cutoff, safe scores & state-wise trends for admission.

content.text: NEET Cut Off 2026 for MBBS Government College is expected to be highly competitive. For General category candidates, a safe score of 610–680+ marks is required for good government MBBS seats under All India Quota (AIQ), while state quota cutoffs are comparatively lower (550–620+).

The exact cutoff will be released after the NEET 2026 result declaration by NTA. This guide covers expected category-wise cutoffs, qualifying vs admission cutoff, state-wise trends, AIQ vs State Quota difference, and safe scores needed to secure a seat in government medical colleges through NEET 2026 counselling.

sections.heading: NEET Cut Off 2026 Expected Marks Category Wise
NEET 2026 Qualifying Cutoff vs Admission Cutoff

content.text: Qualifying Cutoff (released by NTA) is the minimum marks to appear for counselling. Admission Cutoff is the actual last rank/score at which a seat is allotted in government colleges.
Note: Qualifying marks only make you eligible. Admission to government MBBS requires much higher scores.

sections.heading: NEET 2026 State Quota Cutoff: AIQ vs State Quota Comparison

content.text: State quota (85% seats) cutoffs are generally 50–60 marks lower than AIQ, making them the primary route for most students to get government MBBS seats.

sections.heading: State Wise NEET Cutoff 2026 MBBS (General Category)
Minimum Marks for State Quota MBBS

rows: Safe for govt MBBS in almost all states

sections.heading: NEET 2026 Safe Score for Government Medical Colleges

items: State Quota Government Seats: 580–620+ marks (varies by state)
Reserved Categories: Lower scores possible as per category-wise trends above.
